top_signals.title: Japan sheds ties as price index shake-up reflects changing habits
top_signals.summary: Revision of inflation ‘basket’ ditches office wear in favour of protein powder and pet insurance
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Spain’s Cuerpo Touts US Business Ties to Diffuse Trump Tensions
top_signals.summary: Spain is striving to strengthen business links with the US, despite tensions with Donald Trump, according to Economy and Trade Minister Carlos Cuerpo.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
